heroHeadline: BREAKING — Tehran Psychiatric Hospital Destroyed; Universities Struck as US-Israel Expand Infrastructure Campaign
heroSubtitle: A Tehran psychiatric hospital was rendered completely unusable by a US-Israeli strike on Apr 4. US and Israel also struck universities across Iran in an escalating campaign against civilian and academic infrastructure. Trump issued a 48-hour ultimatum to Iran as the April 6 Hormuz deadline approaches.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-04. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post.
